channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Superdome re-opens from lockdown for the Sugar Bowl CFP quarterfinal between Georgia and Notre Dame
item.description: Flags are at half-staff outside the Superdome and at nearby state buildings as fans arrive a day later than scheduled for a College Football Playoff quarterfinal game between Notre Dame and Georgia at the Sugar Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Brett Martel, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Chiefs' Patrick Mahomes left off Pro Bowl roster for 1st time as starter
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs star quarterback Patrick Mahomes was left off the initial Pro Bowl roster on Thursday. Josh Allen, Joe Burrow and Lamar Jackson were named.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bradley Carnell named Philadelphia Union head coach
item.description: The Philadelphia Union has named Johannesburg, South Africa native Bradley Carnell as their new head coach. In his previous role as head coach in CITY SC, Carnell led the team to win the 2023 Western Conference Championship with a 17-12-3 record.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Yakubovsky, PHL 17

item.title: A samurai version of the Old West quick-draw, called iaido, is thriving in the Bay Area
item.description: The martial art is little known outside of Japan and deals with drawing a sword so skillfully your opponent is doomed.
item.dc:creator: John Metcalfe, The Mercury News

item.title: Golf goes indoors on prime time with high-tech TGL league
item.description: PALM BEACH GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Xander Schauffele is making his season debut twice in the span of seven days at venues separated by a lot more than some 5,000 miles.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Pro Bowl rosters include 9 Ravens, 7 Lions, 6 Vikings and Eagles and no Patrick Mahomes
item.description: Nine Baltimore Ravens, including two-time NFL MVP Lamar Jackson and Derrick Henry, were selected for the Pro Bowl Games. The Detroit Lions are next with seven players and the Minnesota Vikings and Philadelphia Eagles each have six players on the NFC roster.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mikaela Shiffrin aiming to be back on snow 'in the next week or so' following November crash
item.description: Mikaela Shiffrin is back in the gym and aiming to be on snow “in the next week or so,” the American skiing star said more than a month after suffering a deep puncture wound in her hip area. The serious injury occurred during a during a crash on Nov. 30 in Killington, Vermont.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Top-seeded Oregon sees title hopes dashed with early knockout by Ohio State
item.description: PASADENA, Calif. (AP) — Oregon withstood many challenges en route to being the only unbeaten team and the top seed in the College Football Playoff.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Derrick Rose to open pop-up flower shop in the Loop Thursday
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Former Chicago Bull and NBA MVP Derrick Rose is opening a pop-up flower shop for one day only in the Loop Thursday. According to a post on Rose's Instagram account, "Rose's Flower Shop" will be open from 12-4 p.m. at 350 North State Street.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Pelicans players, coach grieve those killed in New Orleans attack as they play in Miami
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Trey Murphy III knew his mother was in downtown New Orleans to ring in the new year. His chef was there as well. And when Murphy heard about the tragedy that happened on Bourbon Street, he was scared for their safety. The word eventually came: They were fine.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Sugar Bowl CFP quarterfinal between Georgia and Notre Dame postponed after deadly truck attack
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The College Football Playoff quarterfinal at the Sugar Bowl between Georgia and Notre Dame was postponed a day because of an attack about a mile away from the Superdome early Wednesday, when authorities say a truck driver deliberately plowed into a New Year’s crowd and killed 15 p
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Louisiana attorney general says Sugar Bowl should be delayed to Friday after attack prompts postponement
item.description: Louisiana Attorney General Liz Murrill said she believes the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans should be postponed to Friday after it was pushed back to Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Notre Dame calls on fans to 'join us in prayer’ following apparent terror attack ahead of Sugar Bowl
item.description: The University of Notre Dame is calling on fans in New Orleans ahead of the Sugar Bowl to join in prayer following a "senseless act of violence" that left at least 10 people dead and injured more than two dozen others.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jeanty falls short of record as dream season gets stuffed by Penn State defense in CFP loss
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Ashton Jeanty took the handoff on Boise State's first play and made it just a few steps before being greeted by a wall of dark blue Penn State jerseys that swallowed him up and shoved him backward for no gain.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah's road winning streak ends in Seattle
item.description: SEATTLE (AP) - Jaden Schwartz had a goal and two assists for the Seattle Kraken, who pulled away in the third period for a 5-2 win against the Utah Hockey Club at Climate Pledge Arena on Monday. The loss ends Utah's seven-game road winning streak. “[Points] never come easy,” Schwartz said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bills clinch the AFC's No. 2 seed with a 40-14 rout of the undisciplined Jets
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — Josh Allen reflected on Buffalo’s many offseason critics and doubters when asked about the Bills achieving their latest milestones while sewing up the AFC’s No. 2 seed with a 40-14 rout of the unraveling and undisciplined New York Jets on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jazz lose to Sixers for sixth straight home loss
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Joel Embiid and Tyrese Maxey each scored 32 points to lead the Philadelphia 76ers to a 114-111 victory over the Utah Jazz on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: USU beats San Diego State on last-second shot, 67-66
item.description: SAN DIEGO, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah State men’s basketball earned its first road win over a ranked opponent in over three decades Saturday afternoon in front of a sellout crowd at Viejas Arena, taking down No. 20 San Diego State 67-66.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Athletics president Dave Kaval will resign from organization in the coming days
item.description: (AP) -- Athletics president Dave Kaval will resign from the organization after being the public face of the organization's planned move from Oakland to Las Vegas. Kaval has been president of the A's for the past eight years and will step down from the role on Dec.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Bulls blow 21 point lead in 141-133 loss to Atlanta
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Jalen Johnson had a career-high 30 points and the Atlanta Hawks rallied from a late 21-point deficit by scoring 50 points in the fourth quarter in a 141-133 win over the Chicago Bulls on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Brock Bowers closing in on record held by Mike Ditka
item.description: Las Vegas Raiders tight end Brock Bowers is poised to break Mike Ditka's rookie tight end record of 1,076 yards receiving in Week 17, with only ten yards needed to do so.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: DIRECTV Holiday Bowl: What to know before going
item.description: It will be the first time the Holiday Bowl is held in Mission Valley — where it had been for more than 40 years — since before the pandemic. The two most recent bowl games were played in Petco Park.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5
